nasb.text: All the cities of the Levites in the midst of the possession of the sons of Israel were forty-eight cities with their pasture lands.

esv.text: The cities of the Levites in the midst of the possession of the people of Israel were in all forty-eight cities with their pasturelands.

cnv.text: 在以色列人的地業中，利未人所得的城共四十八座，還有這些城的郊野。

ccb.text: 利未人从以色列各支派共分到四十八座城及其草场，
